name: Ablerex Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Ablerex Electronics Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells uninterruptible power supplies (UPS) and power quality devices for use in industrial and informatics applications in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers energy storage systems; photovoltaic devices; UPS products and accessories; modular and standalone active power filters; automatic transfer switches; and battery monitoring systems. It also manufactures and sells solar energy equipment, as well as provides maintenance and technical services. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
